reason: The score and justifications are strongly consistent with the near-universal fan and critical consensus. Multiple sources (EW, CBR, Collider, Looper, documentarytube) independently confirm the same specific failures: personality flattened from fiery/witty to passive love interest, Harry-Ginny relationship feeling unearned due to missing arc development, agency and Hogwarts resistance transferred to Neville/Luna, and the DA role gutted. The 51/100 score is arguably even generous given how widely she is cited as one of the worst-adapted characters in the franchise. The only reason this isn't a 10 is that some specific claims (Fleur/Phlegm mockery, diary trauma as recurring lens) are harder to verify from public sources, though nothing contradicts them.
